scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (tasks, workers, teams, hubs, administrators); Onfleet is read-only in legacy (write surface is operationally sensitive and deliberately out of scope), so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope

excluded.reason: credential validation probe, not a syncable object stream; used by Check
creating live delivery tasks is operationally sensitive and out of scope for a read-only source connector
mutating live delivery tasks is operationally sensitive and out of scope for a read-only source connector
